Threat Intel Report — APT-Volkov campaign

The campaign uses C2 infrastructure at hxxps://evil[.]com/gate.php and
backup at hxxp://malicious[dot]example-c2[.]net/x. Phishing emails
originate from attacker[at]phish[dot]tld and reference invoice[.]docx
attachments.

DNS observations:
- Primary: 8[.]8[.]8[.]8 was queried (likely DoH check)
- Beacon resolved: payload-server(.)evil(.)com
- Fullwidth obfuscation seen: badactor．com and bad＠domain．com

IOC list:
- SHA256: 2cf24dba5fb0a30e26e83b2ac5b9e29e1b161e5c1fa7425e73043362938b9824
- IPv4 c2: 198[.]51[.]100[.]42
- Tunnel: payload-abc123[.]ngrok[.]io
- Paste: hxxps://pastebin[.]com/raw/Xy12AbCd

Vulnerabilities exploited: CVE-2024-3400 and CVE-2023-23397.
Mapped to MITRE: T1059.001, T1190, T1566.001, T1071.001.
